name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Fort Worth, TX residents find payday and title loans at Speedy Cash on East Lancaster with convenient weekend hours.
description_long:
Speedy Cash is located at 4209 E Lancaster Ave in Fort Worth, TX, on a busy commercial corridor serving the east side of the city. The storefront is standalone and easy to access. Open weekday hours run 9 AM to 7 PM Monday through Thursday, with extended Friday hours until 8 PM, and Saturday service from 10 AM to 6 PM; the location is closed Sundays.

This Fort Worth location provides payday loans and title loans to qualified borrowers. Call 817-534-3093 to discuss loan options, get answers about required documentation, or schedule a convenient time to visit during business hours.

Fort Worth residents should bring a valid ID and proof of income when visiting this East Lancaster location. Speedy Cash offers quick turnaround on short-term loans when you need funds between paychecks.
address: 4209 E Lancaster Ave, Fort Worth, TX 76103

company_info.headquarters: 4209 E Lancaster Ave, Fort Worth, TX 76103

pros: Transparent fee disclosure before signing loan agreement required
Multiple application channels: online start, in-store completion, or hybrid options
Extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays, Saturday hours) accommodates working customers
Bilingual customer service available in English and Spanish
In-store staff assist with application process and answer questions throughout
Nine Memphis-area locations provide geographic convenience
Line of credit product allows flexible borrowing up to $4,000 limit rather than lump sum
Ancillary money services (check cashing, wire transfers, money orders) available same-location
cons: Payday loans carry high implied APR (typical $15-20 per $100 borrowed = 156-260% APR)
Title loans require vehicle collateral with risk of repossession if loan defaults
Maximum loan amounts modest ($425 payday, $4,000 title/LOC) — insufficient for major expenses
No APR, fee schedule, renewal terms, or default consequences disclosed on website
Line of credit product structure not clearly explained (trigger for debt cycling risk)
best_for: Consumers needing $100-$425 for immediate expenses before next paycheck with ability to repay in full
Vehicle owners needing $1,000-$4,000 in collateral-based loans who own their car outright
Customers who prefer in-person application assistance and real-time questions with staff
Banked consumers without access to credit card cash advances or overdraft options
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for employed consumers facing immediate cash shortfalls ($100-$425) between paychecks who can repay in full by next paycheck, or vehicle owners needing $1,000-$4,000 secured loans. The critical caveat is that all products carry high effective interest rates typical of short-term lenders; payday loans often exceed 150% APR and should only be used for genuine emergencies with confirmed ability to repay on schedule to avoid debt cycling.
services: Green Dot Visa debit card services
Vehicle appraisal for title loan collateral
meta_description: Fort Worth, TX Speedy Cash at 4209 E Lancaster Ave. Quick payday and title loans with weekend hours.
